name: Datapulse Technology Limited
summary: Datapulse Technology Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the hotel and hospitality property investment business in South Korea and Singapore. The company is involved in the acquisition, property development, and trading of real estate, such as hotels and hospitality, commercial, industrial, residential, and mixed development properties; and operation of a hotel. It also provides asset management services, as well as engages in the investment activity of holding long-term and trading in short-term investments. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Singapore.
